title: False `Warning-CASEWITHX` in case with wildcards and bad alternative syntax

features.name: casez pattern with bitwise OR instead of comma separator
features.description: Code should include a casez statement where bitwise OR operator is incorrectly used between patterns instead of comma separator

features.name: casez wildcard pattern producing X from bitwise OR
features.description: Code should include a casez pattern expression where bitwise OR of wildcard patterns creates X values that trigger CASEWITHX warning
